description: Security scan suppression rules. Findings matching any rule are excluded from triage and reports.

rule_id.description: Tool rule ID to suppress (e.g., 'python.django.security.injection.sql-injection', 'private-key'). Matches if any of the finding's rule_ids contain this value.

file.description: File path pattern to suppress. Supports * (single dir) and ** (recursive). Examples: 'tests/**', 'src/test_*.py', 'fixtures/*'

cwe.description: CWE to suppress (e.g., 'CWE-798'). Matches if the finding's CWE contains this value.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for why this suppression exists.

created.description: ISO date when suppression was added.

suppressions.reason: Test certificate files, not real credentials
Container runs behind network policy, root is acceptable
